reviews.review_description: After trying over 7 different metaverses, we finally have an easy to use metaverse with beautiful visuals, realistic and well formed avatars and incredible sense of presence with other people! This is great for feeling connected to the other people you are in the “room” with.

Impressive! that's something to see for sure! The most beautiful metaverse project to see at the moment. I mean really, you have to see this worlds in VR! In my opinion it is a way better than anything you could possibly see on any other current VR platforms. The staff is very friendly and сoncierge service is really nice. Great place to facilitate or showroom your projects.
I believe that Metaverse is the future!
Another 'potentially cool environments to look at in an otherwise useless productivity VR suite that is obscured by accountwall' kinda let down for your humble servant, byteframe.

reviews.review_title: Best VR app for enterprise teams
reviews.review_description: High visual fidelity with broad access to culture facilitators. Incredible for team collaboration and training.

As a non-gamer, this app has offered me the connection to my team in a way that I don’t feel intimidated or lost. It’s super easy to use and my engagement level with my colleagues far exceeds what we’ve been able to accomplish in Zoom and other video conference platforms.
Love the concept and the worlds are beautiful!
